note: Ranked, reversible research actions only — no production tuning in this mission.

actions.action: Shadow-gate or size-cap SHORT exposure by regime while keeping LONG path unchanged
actions.expected_impact: Tail data show SHORT sum_pnl negative vs LONG positive; shadow may reduce drag if causal
actions.risk: Shorts may hedge regime moves; gating can worsen drawdowns
actions.confidence: LOW-MEDIUM (tail sample; confounds: symbol mix, time)
actions.verification: 30d shadow ledger vs baseline; per-regime cells require min-n rule
actions.rollback: Disable shadow flag; no broker gate change

actions.action: Paper/shadow tests on delayed exit scenarios; prioritize horizons where MTM differs from realized
actions.expected_impact: Mean horizon deltas small; +60m MTM slightly above realized on average in this sample
actions.risk: Mark-to-bar ≠ executable fills; overnight gaps ignored
actions.verification: Compare distribution of horizon_pnl vs realized; scenario JSON replay
actions.rollback: Discard scenario configs; no main.py threshold edits without governance

actions.action: Shadow ablation on components with negative median-split mean PnL delta (e.g. flow in ALPACA_SIGNAL_RANKING.json)
actions.expected_impact: Noise reduction if component is truly non-informative
actions.risk: Median split and same-sample uplift are non-causal
actions.verification: Shadow portfolio with component mask; walk-forward

actions.action: Lab for top block reasons (displacement_blocked, max_positions_reached) with bars-backed forward path
actions.expected_impact: Quantify opportunity cost vs risk avoided
actions.risk: Survivorship and lookahead if bars misaligned
actions.confidence: LOW without per-block timestamps joined to bars
actions.verification: Replay blocked symbols at block_ts with stored minute bars

actions.action: Fix signal_context emission (env audit + remove silent failure) or dual-write score_snapshot hash id on exit rows
actions.expected_impact: Restores canonical join for learning without relying on nearest snapshot
actions.risk: Extra disk IO; must stay non-blocking
actions.confidence: HIGH for observability; MEDIUM for causality
actions.verification: verify_signal_context_nonempty.py passes; sample row has trade id keys
